issue_summary: Add preserveOriginal option to the NGram and EdgeNGram filters
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Creates EdgeNGramTokenFilter that can generate n-grams in the sizes of the given range
   *
   * @param input {@link TokenStream} holding the input to be tokenized
   * @param minGram the smallest n-gram to generate
   * @param maxGram the largest n-gram to generate
   */
javadoc_after:
/** * Creates an EdgeNGramTokenFilter that, for a given input term, produces all * edge n-grams with lengths >= minGram and <= maxGram. * *

* Behaves the same as * {@link #EdgeNGramTokenFilter(TokenStream, int, int, boolean) * NGramTokenFilter(input, minGram, maxGram, false)} * * @param input {@link TokenStream} holding the input to be tokenized * @param minGram the minimum length of the generated n-grams * @param maxGram the maximum length of the generated n-grams * * @deprecated since 7.4. Use * {@link #EdgeNGramTokenFilter(TokenStream, int, int, boolean)} instead. */
